# DocumentFormat.OpenXml

> activity catalog — fetch a version JSON to get all data needed for XAML generation

## Versions

- [3.3.0](3.3.0.json)
- [3.1.1](3.1.1.json)
- [2.20.0](2.20.0.json)
- [2.16.0](2.16.0.json)
- [2.12.1](2.12.1.json)
- [2.7.2](2.7.2.json)
- [2.5.0](2.5.0.json)
- [1.0](1.0.json)
